chem: Propose 5-10 novel drug scaffolds (SMILES) and synthesis routes for treating {target} with constraints: {constraints}. Focus on feasible synthesis. Output ONLY valid JSON array: [{{"smiles": "c1ccccc1C(=O)O", "route": "From benzoic acid via esterification", "confidence": 0.9}}]
admet: For SMILES {smiles}, compute: QED, Synthetic Accessibility (SA), logP (XLogP3 or Crippen), TPSA, pKa (approx). Output ONLY JSON: {{"qed": 0.7, "sa": 3.2, "logp": 2.5, "tpsa": 37.3, "pka": 4.2}}
tox: For SMILES {smiles}, check PAINS alerts, Brenk filters, Ames mutagenicity (proxy rules or RDKit). Output ONLY JSON: {{"pains": 0, "brenk": 0, "ames": false, "tox_score": 0.85}} (higher better)
pharm: Proxy docking score for {target} (e.g. opioid receptor for pain) on SMILES {smiles}. Estimate binding affinity (kcal/mol, more negative better). Output ONLY JSON: {{"affinity": -7.8, "notes": "Good fit to pocket"}}
synth_notebook: For synthesis route {route}, optimize yields, check safety hazards, generate visualizations. Output ONLY JSON: {{"total_yield": 0.85, "safety_score": 0.9, "images": ["step1.png", "step2.png"], "reagents": [{"reagent": "acid", "quantity": 10}]}}
lab_inventory: Check stock for reagents {reagents} at scale {scale}g. Output ONLY JSON: {{"available": true, "low": [], "est_cost": 50.0}}
